specific_mechanism: Founder populations recovering from bottleneck exhibit reduced effective diversity; recovery rate depends on selection coefficient and migration
llm_application: LLM fine-tuning recovery from low-diversity bottleneck: after aggressive distillation, effective diversity drops; recovery via migration (data augmentation) restores it.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes conservation-biology topological-defect mapping as proposed.
